← All good news Kindness

A Social Experiment Is Handing 1,000 People $500 — to Spend on Someone Else

Drop Dead Generous gives ordinary people real money with one rule: use it creatively to help others.

via Positive News · 1 day ago

🎁

What happens if you give people money for the express purpose of being generous? A project called Drop Dead Generous is finding out, handing 1,000 people $500 each and asking them to spend it on helping others however they see fit.

The result is a sprawling, improvised experiment in kindness — strangers paying off debts, stocking pantries, and dreaming up small acts of care, all to test a simple idea: that generosity, given room, tends to multiply.

Read the full story at Positive News →

How Cloudbreak works

We comb publishers across the web for the stories that make your day a little brighter, show you the headline and a quick summary, then send you straight to the original source for the full story. We don't republish anyone's work — good news belongs to everyone, and credit belongs to the people who reported it.

Spotted something good?

A neighbor, a rescue, a small win on your street — if it made you smile, send it our way.
